Show or update Orbit configuration

Usage: orbit config [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

Commands:
  show  Display current configuration values

Options:
      --root <ROOT>  Override the Orbit root directory (highest precedence)
  -h, --help         Print help
List tasks with optional filters

Usage: orbit task list [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --root <ROOT>
          Override the Orbit root directory (highest precedence)

      --status <STATUS>
          Filter by one or more statuses (comma-separated). Defaults to backlog,in-progress

          Possible values:
          - proposed:    Awaiting human approval before entering the backlog
          - backlog:     Approved and queued for work; not yet started
          - in-progress: Actively being worked on
          - review:      Implementation complete; awaiting review/merge
          - done:        Accepted and closed. Terminal — no further transitions
          - blocked:     Temporarily paused (waiting on a dependency or decision)
          - archived:    Soft-deleted. Can be restored to Backlog
          - rejected:    Declined. Can be re-opened to Backlog or InProgress
          - someday:     Future-scoped — wanted but not yet actionable. Agents skip someday tasks

      --all
          Show all tasks regardless of status

      --priority <PRIORITY>
          Filter by priority level (low, medium, high)
          
          [possible values: low, medium, high, critical]

      --type <TASK_TYPE>
          Filter by task type (task, feature, epic, issue, bug, chore, refactor)

          Possible values:
          - task
          - feature
          - epic
          - friction: Agent-reported friction, DX issues, or system problems. Self-reported friction path — triggers system attribution and scoreboard hooks
          - issue:    General issue tracking. Valid task type, but not part of friction-bounty scoring
          - bug:      An attributable defect — tracks which agent/model introduced the bug via the `agent`, `model`, and `source_task_id` fields on [`Task`]
          - chore
          - refactor

      --parent <PARENT_ID>
          Filter to subtasks belonging to a parent task

      --batch-id <BATCH_ID>
          Filter by batch ID

      --ready
          Keep only tasks whose dependencies are already satisfied

      --json
          Output full task objects as JSON

      --ops
          Output signal-tier JSON (id, title, type, status, priority only)

      --full
          Show all table columns in text output

  -h, --help
          Print help (see a summary with '-h')

Examples:
  orbit task list
  orbit task list --all
  orbit task list --status backlog
  orbit task list --status in-progress,review
  orbit task list --type epic
  orbit task list --priority high
  orbit task list --parent T12345678-123456
  orbit task list --json
error: unexpected argument '--limit' found

Usage: orbit task list [OPTIONS]

For more information, try '--help'.

command_failures.command: /bin/zsh -lc 'orbit tool run orbit.graph.callers --pretty; orbit tool run orbit.graph.refs --pretty; orbit tool run orbit.graph.show --pretty'

/bin/zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail
selectors=$( (
  orbit tool run orbit.graph.search --input '"'{\"query\":\"run_deterministic\"}' | jq -r '.results[].selector'
  orbit tool run orbit.graph.search --input '{\"query\":\"V2RuntimeHost\"}' | jq -r '.results[].selector'
) | sort -u )

for sel in "'$selectors; do
  orbit tool run orbit.graph.refs --input "{'"\\\"selector\\\":\\\""'$sel'"\\\"}\" | jq -r '.code_refs[]? | select(.file|startswith(\"crates/orbit-engine/src/\")) | select(.kind==\"function\" or .kind==\"method\") | .selector'
  orbit tool run orbit.graph.callers --input \"{\\\"selector\\\":\\\""'$sel'"\\\"}\" | jq -r '.callers[]? | select(.file|startswith(\"crates/orbit-engine/src/\")) | select(.kind==\"function\" or .kind==\"method\") | .selector'
done | sort -u"
command_failures.output: jq: error (at <stdin>:1): Cannot iterate over null (null)

command_failures.command:
/bin/zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail
selectors=$( (
  orbit tool run orbit.graph.search --input '"'{\"query\":\"run_deterministic\"}' | jq -r '.results[]?.selector // empty'
  orbit tool run orbit.graph.search --input '{\"query\":\"V2RuntimeHost\"}' | jq -r '.results[]?.selector // empty'
) | sort -u )

for sel in "'$selectors; do
  orbit tool run orbit.graph.refs --input "{'"\\\"selector\\\":\\\""'$sel'"\\\"}\" | jq -r '.code_refs[]? | select((.file? // \"\") | startswith(\"crates/orbit-engine/src/\")) | select((.kind? // \"\") == \"function\" or (.kind? // \"\") == \"method\") | .selector // empty'
  orbit tool run orbit.graph.callers --input \"{\\\"selector\\\":\\\""'$sel'"\\\"}\" | jq -r '.callers[]? | select((.file? // \"\") | startswith(\"crates/orbit-engine/src/\")) | select((.kind? // \"\") == \"function\" or (.kind? // \"\") == \"method\") | .selector // empty'
done | sort -u"
